message:
feat(genome): simplify syncRoot for overlay design

syncRoot now refreshes rootAgents and only detects conflicts (overlay
exists AND root changed). Unmodified agents auto-resolve from root.
Removed SyncRootResult.updated field. reconcileRootToolsAndAgents
only runs when genome has a root overlay. Updated cli.ts to pass
rootDir to Genome constructor.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
